summary: Fractional, tokenized ownership of Tower A via a programmable distribution waterfall. Targets a $5,000,000 raise across 100,000 tokens.
tokenStandard: ERC-3643 (permissioned security token) or equivalent compliant standard

waterfall.name: Return of capital
waterfall.description: Investors receive 100% of contributed capital back first.

waterfall.name: Preferred return
waterfall.description: Investors receive a 14% preferred return before any promote.

waterfall.name: Catch-up
waterfall.description: Sponsor catch-up until the agreed profit split is reached.

waterfall.name: Carried interest / promote
waterfall.description: Remaining profits split per the promote schedule (e.g. 80/20 above hurdle).

legalReviewFlags: Securities classification: likely a security — confirm exemption (Reg D 506(c) / Reg S / Reg A+) with counsel.
KYC/AML and accredited-investor verification required before any subscription.
Transfer restrictions and permissioned-token whitelist must be enforced on-chain.
Jurisdictional review for each target investor market.
No general solicitation or offering until counsel clears the structure.

ownerGate.reason: Requires owner approval — involves: securities, legal, money.
